case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF S. F. vs. SEWARD, HARRY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. N DEFENDANTS HARRY SEWARD AND DAMIAN RUSSELL SHALL PAY BACK RENT OF $1,364 CALCULATED THROUGH 6-13-95. BY 6-20-95, 5PM $760 SHALL BE PAID TO THE HOUSING AUTHORITY. THIS MONEY SHALL COME FROM SUMS BEING HELD BY SAN FRANCISCO LEGAL ASSISTANCE FOR MR. SEWARD. BY THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH CURRENT RENT SHALL BE PAID ALONG WITH $87 TOWARD BACK RENT. IN THE MONIES RECEIVED,CURRENT RENT WILL BE PAID FIRST, THEN BACK RENT. IF ANY PAYMENTS ARE NOT MADE, PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE EX PARTE FOR A WRIT OF POSSESSION, FOR 360 VALENCIA, #107 AND FOR ANY MONIES OWED. DEFENDANTS WILL BE GIVEN 7 DAYS NOTICE PRIOR TO ANY ACTION TAKEN. IF ALL THE TERMS OF THIS STIPULATION ARE MET, PLAINTIFF, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, SHALL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION, BACK RENT & LEASE FORFEITURE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC BODY, CORPORATE AND POLITIC
DEFT DAMIAN RUSSELL FAILED TO APPEAR AT SETTL CONF - JURY DEMAND STRICKEN AS TO HIM ONLY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEWARD, HARRY RUSSELL, DAMIAN SUEDAS DAMIAN, RUSSELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 360 VALENCIA ST, #107, SF, CA $778.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $778.00, LEASE FORFEITED
